signIn.welcomeDescription: We're excited to have you join the community. Enter your email to get started.
signIn.offlineNotice: Sign in requires an internet connection.
signIn.noPasswordHint: No password needed — we'll send you a secure link.
signIn.recoverPrompt: Can't access your email? Recover account

magicLinkSent.title: Check your email!
magicLinkSent.body: We've sent a magic link to {{email}}
magicLinkSent.instructions: Click the link in your email to sign in.

recovery.title: Account Recovery
recovery.description: Enter an email linked to your account. Magic links will be sent to all email addresses on that account.

recoverySent.title: Recovery emails sent!
recoverySent.body: If an account exists for {{email}}, magic links have been sent to all linked email addresses.

guestData.title: Delete Guest Data
guestData.prompt: This will remove all data associated with your guest session.

device.title: Device Authentication
device.signInPrompt: Sign in to approve this device code.
device.approvedBody: Authenticated as {{nickname}}. You can close this tab.
device.rejectedBody: The device code was not approved. You can close this tab.
device.requestBody: A CLI tool is requesting access to your {{nickname}} account.
device.verifyCode: Verify this code matches what your terminal shows.

oidc.verifiedEmailRequired: Wiki access requires a verified email. Sign in with a magic link first.
oidc.pleaseSignIn: Please sign in to continue to the wiki…
oidc.signingIn: Signing you in to the wiki…

guestBanner.signInToSave: <signin>Sign in</signin> to save your progress and access all features

profileHint.cleanupCreate: Participants will see you as the organizer. Add a name or photo so people know who's hosting.
profileHint.teamCreate: Members will see you as the team's founder. A name or photo makes the team feel less anonymous.
